policy: Every SvelteKit route module under frontend/src/routes must be explicitly dispositioned. Pending production routes must be modernized, merged, or retired with real contract, SEO/legal, entitlement, and browser-QA evidence before the Valdrics frontend migration is complete.

entries.decision: Keep migrated landing route with current pricing intent, current auth intent URLs, and real Valdrics logo asset.
entries.next_action: Keep public QA tied to current pricing and auth intent contracts.

entries.decision: Keep public security contact endpoint.
entries.next_action: Keep aligned with security contact ownership.

entries.decision: Keep temporary dashboard visual QA fixture until FME-011 evidence cleanup.
entries.next_action: Replace with route-native evidence bundle during FME-011.

entries.decision: Keep temporary inventory visual QA fixture until FME-011 evidence cleanup.
entries.next_action: Replace with route-native evidence bundle during FME-011.

entries.decision: Keep temporary onboarding visual QA fixture until FME-011 evidence cleanup.
entries.next_action: Replace with route-native evidence bundle during FME-011.

entries.decision: Keep temporary savings visual QA fixture until FME-011 evidence cleanup.
entries.next_action: Replace with route-native evidence bundle during FME-011.

entries.decision: Keep temporary settings/policy visual QA fixture until FME-011 evidence cleanup.
evidence: Settings and policy browser QA capture fixture.
entries.next_action: Replace with route-native evidence bundle during FME-011.

entries.decision: Keep only if it remains a distinct public narrative route after public IA consolidation.
entries.next_action: Audit public copy, SEO purpose, and Valdrics visual fit during FME-010.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires keep/merge/retire decision with SEO and public navigation evidence.

entries.decision: Keep only if admin comment moderation remains product-critical.
entries.next_action: Map admin entitlement, API endpoint, moderation actions, and admin layout.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires admin route contract audit and prune decision.

entries.decision: Keep as admin health candidate, modernized with authenticated Valdrics density and entitlement handling.
entries.next_action: Audit health data contracts and admin-only access behavior.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires admin route contract audit and browser QA.

entries.decision: Keep only if landing campaign operations remain necessary after public marketing modernization.
entries.next_action: Confirm marketing operations ownership and API contracts.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires admin/public-marketing consolidation decision.

entries.decision: Keep while matching admin workflow is pending disposition.
entries.next_action: Re-check ownership when /admin/customer-comments is dispositioned.

entries.decision: Keep production edge proxy boundary; browser code must not call private backend origins directly.
entries.next_action: Continue adding route contract tests for migrated mutating actions.

entries.decision: Keep public currency helper while pricing route preserves production pricing source of truth.
entries.next_action: Re-check during pricing modernization.

entries.decision: Keep while marketing/admin comment workflows are pending disposition.
entries.next_action: Re-check when proof/resources/admin comments are consolidated.

entries.decision: Keep marketing subscription endpoint if the public CTA remains supported.
entries.next_action: Confirm CTA ownership during public route modernization.

entries.decision: Keep sales submission endpoint while /talk-to-sales is pending modernization.
entries.next_action: Re-check payload and privacy handling when /talk-to-sales is modernized.

entries.decision: Keep migrated approvals route with real queue model and entitlement states.
entries.next_action: Keep contract tests aligned with approval backend changes.

entries.decision: Keep as operational route candidate; modernize or merge into ops if duplicative.
entries.next_action: Inventory filters, exports, detail modal, and API contracts.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires operational route modernization/prune decision.

entries.decision: Keep auth callback endpoint; visual migration must preserve this contract.
entries.next_action: Re-run during FME-009.

entries.decision: Keep auth flow endpoint used by public login/signup intent links.
entries.next_action: Re-run during FME-009 and preserve current pricing plan intent.

entries.decision: Keep migrated auth entry route with Valdrics dark auth-card treatment, real PNG logo, signup mode on /auth/login, and preserved Supabase/session behavior.
evidence: corepack pnpm@10.32.1 --dir frontend exec vitest run src/routes/auth/login/login-page.svelte.test.ts src/routes/auth/flow/flow-route.server.test.ts src/routes/auth/callback/callback-route.server.test.ts src/routes/auth/session/session-route.server.test.ts
Browser QA /auth/login?intent=roi_assessment&persona=cfo desktop 1440x900 and mobile 390x844: console errors 0, horizontal overflow false, current valdrics_icon.png loaded, signup controls visible.
entries.next_action: Add or confirm focused logout route coverage before closing the auth endpoint slice.

entries.decision: Keep logout endpoint as verified auth session-teardown route redirecting to /auth/login.
entries.next_action: Keep logout redirect aligned with /auth/login if auth routing changes.

entries.decision: Keep session endpoint used by auth/session runtime contract.
entries.next_action: Re-run during auth visual alignment.

entries.decision: Keep billing route candidate; preserve billing and pricing contracts while modernizing.
entries.next_action: Audit billing controls, entitlement gates, and API paths.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires billing contract preservation and no pricing drift.

entries.decision: Evaluate server-load-only route for merge into resources/insights or rebuild as real Valdrics content page.
entries.next_action: Confirm route render ownership, SEO value, and content strategy.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires public content IA and SEO disposition.

entries.decision: Keep migrated connections/source setup route reconciled with inventory.
entries.next_action: Keep source setup and inventory coverage reconciled as backend inventory expands.

entries.decision: Keep migrated dashboard overview backed by current loader and reporting contracts.
entries.next_action: Keep partial API failure and browser capture coverage in the release bundle.

entries.decision: Keep pending docs IA and visual modernization.
entries.next_action: Audit docs IA, SEO, and visual fit.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires public content modernization and SEO evidence.

entries.decision: Keep dynamic docs route only if docs collection remains in production IA.
entries.next_action: Verify slug contracts, not-found behavior, and typography.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires dynamic content contract and SEO review.

entries.decision: Evaluate whether API docs remains separate or merges into docs IA.
entries.next_action: Audit API documentation accuracy and visual fit.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires API-docs product/SEO disposition.

entries.decision: Evaluate whether technical validation belongs under docs, proof, or resources.
entries.next_action: Decide route placement and modernize if retained.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires public content IA decision.

entries.decision: Keep high-value public enterprise route candidate; align with pricing, proof, security, and Valdrics public visuals.
entries.next_action: Modernize enterprise narrative and browser QA.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires public route modernization and sales CTA contract review.

entries.decision: Keep sustainability route candidate only with real GreenOps contracts and authenticated Valdrics design.
entries.next_action: Audit metrics, recommendations, schedules, and backend contracts.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires GreenOps contract and visual modernization pass.

entries.decision: Evaluate separate insights IA versus merge into blog/resources/proof.
entries.next_action: Audit content strategy, SEO, and visual fit.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires public content route consolidation decision.

entries.decision: Keep dynamic insights route only if insights remains in public IA.
entries.next_action: Verify dynamic slug contracts with insights index.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires dynamic public content contract review.

entries.decision: Keep migrated inventory route backed by real backend inventory contract and reconciled with connections.
entries.next_action: Keep ownership and inventory expansion backend-contract-backed.

entries.decision: Evaluate product value versus merge into GreenOps, savings, or dashboard recognition surfaces.
entries.next_action: Audit data contracts, behavior value, and route bloat risk.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires product-value and contract-backed keep/merge/retire decision.

entries.decision: Keep AI/LLM route only if usage, cost, or policy controls are backed by real contracts.
entries.next_action: Audit LLM contracts, cost controls, policy controls, and visual fit.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires LLM route contract and product-value disposition.

entries.decision: Keep migrated onboarding route with real provider setup validation and connector payload contracts.
entries.next_action: Keep provider setup validation contract-backed.

entries.decision: Keep operational command candidate while pruning duplicated admin/audit/status workflows.
entries.next_action: Audit every ops section, modal, action, and backend loader.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires operational IA and route-consolidation decision.

entries.decision: Treat as route-bloat risk until it proves separate value from ops/admin marketing analytics.
entries.next_action: Decide merge into ops/admin campaigns or retire.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires route-consolidation and product-value decision.

entries.decision: Keep and modernize only with current production pricing source of truth; handoff pricing rejected.
entries.next_action: Align pricing visuals while preserving Free, Starter, Growth, and Pro contracts.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires no pricing drift, billing-cycle tests, and signup intent preservation.

entries.decision: Keep legal route; modernize typography without changing legal meaning.
entries.next_action: Review legal content ownership and responsive typography.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires legal review before visible copy changes.

entries.decision: Keep evidence/proof route candidate; align with resources/docs and current proof contracts.
entries.next_action: Audit proof IA, dynamic proof routes, and visual system.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires public content consolidation and SEO decision.

entries.decision: Keep only if dynamic proof content remains a production evidence surface.
entries.next_action: Verify slug content contract, not-found behavior, and visual system.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires dynamic proof route content contract review.

entries.decision: Keep resource route candidate; consolidate with docs/proof/blog/insights if duplicative.
entries.next_action: Audit public content IA and downloadable resources.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires public content route consolidation and SEO review.

entries.decision: Keep only if dynamic resource pages remain part of public resource contract.
entries.next_action: Verify dynamic resource slug behavior and content ownership.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires dynamic resource route contract review.

entries.decision: Keep controlled public downloadable workbook while resources route remains pending.
entries.next_action: Re-check ownership during resources modernization.

entries.decision: Keep controlled public one-pager endpoint while enterprise/resources routes remain pending.
entries.next_action: Re-check ownership during enterprise/resources modernization.

entries.decision: Keep controlled public ROI assumptions endpoint while ROI planner remains pending.
entries.next_action: Re-check ownership during ROI planner modernization.

entries.decision: Keep public SEO endpoint.
entries.next_action: Keep aligned with public route disposition.

entries.decision: Keep ROI route candidate; modernize around current assumptions without invented savings claims.
entries.next_action: Audit assumptions, form controls, downloadable CSV contract, and browser QA.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires no invented ROI values and public CTA contract review.

entries.decision: Keep migrated savings route backed by existing savings proof, drilldown, and realized-events contracts.
entries.next_action: Keep savings claims tied to real reporting fields only.

entries.decision: Keep migrated settings/policy route with current notification, workflow, AI strategy, safety, and enforcement contracts.
entries.next_action: Resolve ownership/identity placement without duplicating settings routes.

entries.decision: Keep public SEO endpoint and update route inclusion after public pruning.
entries.next_action: Re-run after public route merge or retirement.

entries.decision: Kept and modernized as a public operational trust route because it renders a server-verified /health snapshot, explicit fallback provenance, dependency states, and no incident/calendar claims that the backend does not provide. Replaced the generic marketing wrapper with a route-local status view so the page is scan-friendly, static-render safe, and visually aligned with the Valdrics public system.
evidence: corepack pnpm@10.32.1 --dir frontend exec vitest run src/routes/status/status.server.test.ts src/routes/status/status-page.svelte.test.ts
entries.next_action: Add browser QA evidence during the next public-route visual pass.

entries.decision: Keep and modernize sales-contact route if marketing submission endpoint remains supported.
entries.next_action: Audit form payload, privacy copy, and public visual system.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires marketing endpoint contract and privacy-safe form handling.

entries.decision: Keep legal route; modernize typography without changing legal meaning.
entries.next_action: Review legal content ownership and responsive typography.
entries.deletion_blocker: Requires legal review before visible copy changes.
